signals.headline: US Nears $20B Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]
signals.raw:
US Nears $20B Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]

Ethereum price rose to ~$2,358 on April 17 amid this geopolitical de-escalation, driving a broad crypto rally with Bitcoin hitting $76,370 and boosting ETH near $2,400 [1][3]. Oil prices dropped, fueling risk-on sentiment that lifted prediction markets like Polymarket's "ETH to $4,000 by April end" to 56% YE
